nasb.text: He measured its length, twenty cubits, and the width, twenty cubits, before the nave; and he said to me, “This is the most holy place.”

esv.text: And he measured the length of the room, twenty cubits, and its breadth, twenty cubits, across the nave. And he said to me, “This is the Most Holy Place.”

cnv.text: 他量了內殿，長十公尺，寬十公尺，貼著外殿。他對我說：“這是至聖所。”

ccb.text: 他量了内殿，长宽各十米。他对我说：“这是至圣所。”
